headline: Global Payments to Report First Quarter Results on May 6, 2026
summary: ATLANTA, April 22, 2026--Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN) will release first-quarter financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, May 6, 2026.

headline: BMO Capital Initiates Coverage On Global Payments with Market Perform Rating, Announces Price Target of $76
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Andrew Bauch   initiates coverage on Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) with a Market Perform rating and announces Price Target of $76.
